name: fpf-work-guide
description: FPF-backed reasoning skill with refresh gate, chunk-first lookup, cache fallback, and protocol routing.

interface.shortDescription: Use current cached FPF context in Codex work.
interface.longDescription: Distributes the FPF Work Guide skill for Codex. The skill refreshes or validates local FPF and FPF Codex protocol caches, uses chunk-first FPF lookup when valid, falls back to cache when GitHub is unavailable, and discloses cached/fresh status.
defaultPrompt: Use FPF Work Guide for this answer.
Run the FPF refresh gate, then review this plan.
Use FPF-backed reasoning for this task.
